enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, capturing the essence of youthful exuberance.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Whistle, this song is performed during a lively celebration scene, enhancing the festive mood.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Anitha Chandrasekar, known for her energetic performances.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music is composed by D Imman, who is celebrated for his catchy tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 4, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Azhagiya Asura' from the movie Whistle is a lively and energetic number that embodies the spirit of celebration. It showcases the joy and excitement of youth, making it perfect for festive occasions. The vibrant lyrics and upbeat music evoke feelings of happiness and enthusiasm, inviting listeners to join in the fun. Overall, this track is a delightful addition to any party playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhagiya Asura Song Lyrics Whistle is a vibrant track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Anitha Chandrasekar's dynamic vocals and D Imman's infectious beats, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Dive into the lively world of Whistle and experience the excitement it brings!
stanzaMeanings: Beautiful demon, beautiful demon, is there no desire for meaning?
In my dreams, do my fingers not touch anything?
I will make a small garland in a circular shape.
If you come up, I will take you and make you my own.
I will plant the seeds that grow in the house and nurture you.
Beautiful demon, beautiful demon, is there no desire for meaning?
In my dreams, do my fingers not touch anything?
In the blue sea, the eyes hold the wealth of a woman.
In the dark curls, the touch of women will become a success.
Who is the one that says I will live with everything?
Beautiful demon,
Yesterday in a dream, I saw two snakes behind me.
I saw flowers blooming in the snake's path... I saw the star in the sky.
Every day, everything is good, and I saw it too.
Beautiful demon, beautiful demon, is there no desire for meaning?
In my dreams, do my fingers not touch anything?
I will make a small garland in a circular shape.
If you come up, I will take you and make you my own.
I will plant the seeds that grow in the house and nurture you.
Beautiful demon, beautiful demon, is there no desire for meaning?
In my dreams, do my fingers not touch anything?
